chapter_title.ar: باب ثَوَابِ مَنْ مَشَى مَعَ جَنَازَةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 43- Rewards of the one who walks with a coffin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/23)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/23)
text: فِيمَا نَاجَى بِهِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) رَبَّهُ قَالَ يَا رَبِّ مَا لِمَنْ شَيَّعَ جَنَازَةً قَالَ أُوَكِّلُ بِهِ مَلَائِكَةً مِنْ مَلَائِكَتِي مَعَهُمْ رَايَاتٌ يُشَيِّعُونَهُمْ مِنْ قُبُورِهِمْ إِلَى مَحْشَرِهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Sinan, from Abu Al Jaroud,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Among what Musa<sup>as</sup> whispered to his<sup>as</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> was that he<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! What is for the one who escorts a coffin?’ He<sup>azwj</sup> Said: “I<sup>azwj</sup> Allocate and Angel from My<sup>azwj</sup> Angels to be with him, there being banners with them. They would be escorting them from their graves up to their Resurrection (Plains)’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Sinan from abu al-Jarud who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One of the private conversations that Moses had with his Lord was this: “O Lord, what is the reward for one who escorts a deceased person?” The Lord said, “I assign angels of My angels who carry banners when escorting them from their graves to the station for Judgment.’”
